floor_history.headline: fable-blitz deep recon: csmd4 IS marionation region-1's cheaper twin (no region-3) - the whole gap is the in-place-basin v1/a0 allocation-equation flip (pri(arg5) > pri(t0)); the wrap-weighting x in-p

Structural axis (decl order, s32/u32 narrow, statement re-assoc under arg5-after-t0) closed directly on csmd4: 4/4 masked-INERT at 2, head-order flip regresses to 7 - twin's structural closure confirm

Structural axis on csmd4 h5 base fully closed: 13 variants swept (var-splits, expression compression, decl-position, pointer-deref form) — 8 INERT at masked 2, 5 measured regressions (t0s-split=3, arg

frontier.hypothesis: do-while(0) wrap around the arg5-chain ONLY lifts arg5-qty loop-weighted refs (flow.c REG_N_REFS × loop depth) so pri(arg5) > pri(t0) strictly.
frontier.mechanism: do-while(0) emits NOTE_INSN_LOOP_BEG (sanctioned 2026-07-06); local-alloc.c qty_compare weights refs by loop depth. The structural sweep now closes the un-wrapped structural axis, so this remains the ONLY untried differentiator on h5.
frontier.next_probe: Wrap ONLY `{ v0 = idx_1494[1]; v0 <<= 2; arg5 = *(s32*)(v0+(s32)tbl_125c); }` in do{...}while(0); sandbox + QTYDBG to verify arg5-qty refs lift AND the LOOP_BEG note doesn't split the window.

frontier.hypothesis: An alternate multi-set arg5 VALUE carrier (not the v0-carrier which regressed to 12) whose use-shape defeats cse's single-set-source copy-fold precondition.
frontier.mechanism: cse.c copy-propagation folds single-set reg sources; the carrier must be legitimately multi-set OR its use-shape must break the fold precondition even at single-set.
frontier.next_probe: Sweep {arg5 through cnt-carrier (cnt dead after do_timeout), arg5 masked with 0xFFFFFF via v0, arg5 threaded through idx-return-value re-use} — the untried carriers not in the rejected bank.

frontier.hypothesis: The residual v1/a0 exchange requires fmt-la scheduling AFTER t0's last use; source-level respelling of the fmt symbol is INERT (rejected/fmt_la_late_local.c), so the lever must hide the symbol from cse.c equiv_constant.
frontier.mechanism: GCC 2.7.2 cse.c equiv_constant folds symbol addresses regardless of C staging; lui/addiu selection is post-CSE. Only a construct that hides the symbol from equiv_constant would move it.
frontier.next_probe: Opaque-carrier: `static void *volatile fmt_hold = &D_800161C8;` + read at call site; verify equiv_constant no longer sees the constant.
